title: Partition suits by emancipated minors.
doc_html:
Art. 1313.  Partition suits by emancipated minors.

Minors who are emancipated to enable them to administer their estate can, with the same authorization and with the assistance of their curators ad lites, sue for the partition of property in which they are interested.
doc_text:
Art. 1313.  Partition suits by emancipated minors.
Minors who are emancipated to enable them to administer their estate can, with the same authorization and with the assistance of their curators
ad lites
, sue for the partition of property in which they are interested.
